sentences.english: In the U.S., tipping is basically required.
You are expected to tip at least fifteen to twenty percent.
It can even be considered rude if you try to tip.
sentences.korean: 팁을 주려 하면 무례하다고 여겨질 수도 있어요.

sentences.english: I think tipping should be optional, not expected.
sentences.korean: 팁은 기대가 아니라 선택이어야 한다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: Workers should be paid properly by their employers.
sentences.korean: 노동자들은 고용주에게 제대로 된 급여를 받아야 해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
